analyst_note: Broadcom delivered a stellar quarter with revenue surging 29.5% YoY to $19.3 billion, driven by robust product sales. The combination of $8.26 billion in operating cash flow and massive share repurchases highlights exceptional execution and strong capital return to shareholders.
